text:
There once was a quiet village nestled among rolling hills. In the center of the village was an old, cobblestoned fountain. Everyone knew the story of Captain Echo. Long ago, Captain Echo was a jovial sailor who sailed the seas for years. He’d return to the quiet village with tales so thrilling, the chimes on the fountain used to echo with every adventure. One night, as the villagers sat by the fountain casting their reflections in the water, the chimes sang a song unlike any before. This time, instead of the usual tales of faraway islands, the chimes spoke of the village itself and its secrets.

The next morning, the villagers began to notice changes. Flowers flourished where they were scarce, and birds chirped more melodiously than they did at sea. Children laughed louder at play, and the dogs barked just right. Everyone felt a wave of unexplainable joy. The villagers got together to investigate the fountain. What they found was not their
